bad_result_policy: Rejected result: no refinement, direct inversion, or extension of this failed adaptive pair residual hypothesis is proposed. One optional divergent child only uses a different mechanism.

divergent.hypothesis: Use slow cross-sectional risk/quality proxies and regime allocation rather than residual pair mean reversion, correlation gates, cointegration filters, or direct inversion.

costs_slippage_handling.decision_uses_precost_metrics: Rejected despite pre-cost qfa results, so applying costs would not improve decision.
costs_slippage_handling.documented_assumption: 5 bps one-way slippage/commission per traded notional would further reduce reported pre-cost results.
costs_slippage_handling.qfa_limitation: Current qfa backtest CLI has no native commission/slippage/turnover-cost parameter.

data_source.provider: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway
data_source.statement: Alpaca real market data only; qfa CLI was run without --data-csv.

db_used.db_retention_note: Temporary SQLite DB was removed after extracting qfa JSON results.

decision.rationale: Primary qfa Sharpe -0.26783072, total return -0.04554243, max drawdown -0.12406996; six-window median Sharpe -0.03281383 is non-positive pre-cost.

notes: Adaptive pair selection uses rolling correlation plus residual AR(1) persistence, half-life, and zero-crossing filters.
No broker order path, daemon, or trading command was invoked.

warnings: All qfa metrics are pre-cost because qfa has no cost/slippage option.
Random windows were intentionally limited to six for efficient issue completion.
Warmup periods may have zero exposure until rolling lookbacks are populated.
